narrative:
Darby Clarks Lake (precinct in Pickaway County) has 656 registered voters, with 54.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.8%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.4 percentage points.
